# Toast

Surfaces transient notifications via a Sonner-backed toaster region.

## Install

```bash
pnpm dlx @stalk-ui/cli add @stalk-ui/toast
```

## Examples

<ComponentPreview
  slug="toast"
  example={0}
  code={`<>
  <Button onClick={() => toast('Project saved')}>Show toast</Button>
  <Toaster />
</>`}
/>

```tsx
<>
  <Button onClick={() => toast('Project saved')}>Show toast</Button>
  <Toaster />
</>
```

<ComponentPreview
  slug="toast"
  example={1}
  code={`<>
  <Button onClick={() => toast.success('Invite sent', { description: 'teammate@stalk-ui.com will receive an email shortly.' })}>Success</Button>
  <Toaster richColors />
</>`}
/>

```tsx
<>
  <Button
    onClick={() =>
      toast.success('Invite sent', {
        description: 'teammate@stalk-ui.com will receive an email shortly.',
      })
    }
  >
    Success
  </Button>
  <Toaster richColors />
</>
```

<ComponentPreview
  slug="toast"
  example={2}
  code={`<>
  <Button onClick={() => toast('Message archived', { description: 'Removed from your inbox.', action: { label: 'Undo', onClick: () => toast('Restored') } })}>Archive</Button>
  <Toaster />
</>`}
/>

```tsx
<>
  <Button
    onClick={() =>
      toast('Message archived', {
        description: 'Removed from your inbox.',
        action: { label: 'Undo', onClick: () => toast('Restored') },
      })
    }
  >
    Archive
  </Button>
  <Toaster />
</>
```

No component-specific props are documented yet. Primitive props pass through to the underlying element or Radix part.
